title: ElvisCraft
description: Adds bunch of Ores, Mobs, Bosses, and Structures to Overworld and other Dimensions.
body:
Intruducting: ElvisMod Join My Discord: https://discord.gg/ngcv6E6N9H -------------------------------------------------------------------------
Presentation: -------------------------------------------------------------------------- ElvisCraft adds a lot of ores like Lead, Aluminium or Magnesium which can be found in Overworld, Nether or End. These new ores can be used in crafting of boss crystals, armor or utility items.
Also adds 8 new gems what can be used to craft new utility items.
The mod also introduces new types of zombies, spiders, and slimes. Furthermore, it adds 4 new bosses - Zombie King, Slime Boss, Chaos Spawn and Mummy. These bosses can be spawned using special crystals thich can be crafted using new ores and mob drops.
Crystals can also start new PvE challenges.
Follow achievements to learn how to spawn bosses and craft items.
---------------------------------------------------------------------- Mod made in McReactor.
Recommended to use some crafting help mod like Too many Items to know crafts since there are not show anywhere.
--------------------------------------------------------------------- New Ores:
New Mobs:
Crystal charger:
--- Crystal charger is used to summon bosses with crystals ---
